children.name: hwMdnsRelayGatewayIPGlobal
children.description:
This item shows the mDNS gateway ip.
                    Users can also set gateway ip through this item

children.name: hwMdnsRelaySourceIPGlobal
children.description:
This item shows the source ip of mDNS relay.
                Users can also set source ip through this item.

children.name: hwMdnsRelayCfgTable
children.description: This item shows the configuration of mDNS relay.

children.name: hwMdnsRelayCfgEntry
children.description: The mDNS relay configuration table struct.

children.name: hwMdnsRelayEnable
children.description: This item shows the enable status of mDNS relay.

children.name: hwMdnsRelayProbeInterval
children.description:
This item shows the service probe interval of mDNS relay.
                    Users can also set service probe interval through this item.
